message:
🐛 Add 7-day screenshot retention policy with automated cleanup (#4352)

* Add 7-day screenshot retention policy with automated cleanup

- Create cleanup-screenshots.yml: scheduled daily workflow that deletes
  screenshot files older than 7 days from .github/screenshots/
- Before deletion, rewrites any branch-based raw URLs in issue comments
  to commit-SHA-based URLs so images remain visible in issues
- Update process-screenshots.yml to emit permanent commit-SHA URLs from
  the start, eliminating the need for URL rewriting on new screenshots

Closes #4349

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Address review feedback on cleanup-screenshots workflow

- Use --diff-filter=A in git log to find the original add-commit (not
  the most recent commit that touched the file) for correct age and SHA
- Switch from execSync to execFileSync to prevent shell injection from
  untrusted request ID path components
- Use replaceAll instead of replace for URL rewriting in comments
- Paginate listComments via github.paginate() to handle issues with
  more than 100 comments
- Add git pull --rebase before push to handle concurrent main commits

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
